name: Setu
description: Indian fintech infrastructure platform offering APIs for Aadhaar/PAN KYC, account aggregation, UPI, BBPS and e-sign.

seo.title: Setu — Identity / Auth / User Management
seo.meta_description: Setu: Indian fintech infrastructure platform offering APIs for Aadhaar/PAN KYC, account aggregation, UPI, BBPS and e-sign.

when_to_use: Aadhaar-based KYC API for Indian fintech onboarding
UPI payment integration for Indian app developers
Account aggregator framework integration for open banking
BBPS bill payment API for utility service platforms
PAN verification for income tax and KYC compliance in India

pros: Broad Indian fintech infra: KYC, AA, UPI, BBPS, e-sign
Good for lending and wealth onboarding flows
cons: India-only; not relevant for global products
Heavier compliance lift than point tools
Some APIs depend on third-party regulator uptime
review.verdict: Strong one-stop Indian fintech API layer; less useful if you only need one capability like e-sign.
review.best_for: Indian fintechs bundling KYC, UPI and e-sign from one vendor
review.not_for: Global apps or simple single-use e-signature needs
